recommendations.title: Checkered Ninja
recommendations.overview: A possessed Ninja doll teams up with a teenage boy to avenge the murder of a poor child factory worker.

recommendations.title: Bionicle: Mask of Light
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: With darkness encroaching on the island of Mata Nui, the only hope for the survival of the islanders rests with two Matoran villagers, who must find the seventh Toa and deliver to him the fabled Mask of Light.

recommendations.title: Ultraman: Rising
recommendations.overview: A star athlete reluctantly returns home to take over his father's duties as Ultraman, shielding Tokyo from giant monsters as he becomes a legendary hero.

recommendations.title: Seventh Son

recommendations.title: The Seventh Company Outdoors
recommendations.overview: The third part of Seventh Company adventures.

recommendations.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: The Lost Tower

recommendations.title: Superman: Unbound
recommendations.overview: Superman and Supergirl take on the cybernetic being known as Brainiac, who boasts that he possesses "the knowledge and strength of 10,000 worlds."

recommendations.title: The Witcher: Nightmare of the Wolf
recommendations.overview: Escaping from poverty to become a witcher, Vesemir slays monsters for coin and glory, but when a new menace rises, he must face the demons of his past.

recommendations.title: Dad
